title: Compliance: lichen/l2/lichen_l2.c TOFU
description: Policy: 06-security.md §8.6. File: lichen/subsys/lichen/l2/lichen_l2.c. Status: VIOLATION. lichen_peer_add() silently updates existing peer pubkey (line 750) without detecting/rejecting key change. Spec requires: reject key change and alert. Fix needed: compare existing->pubkey with new pubkey, reject if different.
close_reason: Fixed: Added memcmp check in lichen_peer_add() - returns -EEXIST if pubkey mismatch with existing peer
